primary_text:
A grocery store where every product comes from a named regenerative farm.

Not a meal kit. Not a lock-in box. A real grocery store where you pick what you want and collect it fresh from the hub.

100% grass-fed beef. Wild-caught salmon. Pasture-raised chicken. Biodynamic dairy. All from farms you can visit.

Zero warehouses. Zero wholesalers. Food that's days old, not weeks. Farmers earning a fairer deal.

Brookvale hub. Monday to Friday. No lock-in.
headline: A grocery store with no middlemen
description: Named regenerative farms. Fresh food collected from the Brookvale hub. No lock-in.
creative_brief: Clean brand statement on warm background. Below: row of four products (beef, salmon, eggs, dairy) each labelled with their farm name. Confident, minimal.
